rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending earlier category-specific spatial multimarket CPG work, and the cited 2002 JMR paper is exactly a multimarket scanner-data spatial-dependence/prediction study in this domain (including Mexican salsa markets). Given this strong thematic and methodological alignment (geography, cross-market dependence, multimarket data), the citation is plausibly foundational or method-relevant rather than an obvious incidental mention.
